---
title: "ISSJ sequencing stats"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: show
    code-tools: true
toc: true
toc-title: Document Contents
number-sections: true
embed-resources: true
---

### Read in data
```{r}
stats<-read.csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DevonDeRaad/ISSJ.WGS/refs/heads/main/sequenced.sample.info.csv")
```
